meaning: n.向内生长,长在肉内,向内生长物
examples: All bone-prosthesis interface of acetabulum and femoral stem achieved bone ingrowth stable.
Tylose a bladder like ingrowth from a parenchyma cell into an adjacent tracheid or vessel through a paired pit.
Objective To study the effects of micromotion in certain parameters on the ingrowth and differentiation of bone.
